home.headline: Attendance Allowance Eligibility Check
home.subheadline: Find out if you may be entitled to Attendance Allowance and get free, confidential support from our team.
home.chooseLanguage: Please choose your language to continue

eligibility.title: Check Your Eligibility
eligibility.intro: Answer a few quick questions to see if you may be entitled to Attendance Allowance. This is not a government application — our team will contact you to help with the next steps.
eligibility.residencyQuestion: Have you lived in Great Britain for at least 2 of the last 3 years?
eligibility.benefitQuestion: Are you currently receiving Disability Living Allowance (DLA), Personal Independence Payment (PIP), or Adult Disability Payment (ADP)?
eligibility.careQuestion: Do you have a disability, illness, or mental health condition that means you need help with personal care or supervision?
eligibility.careHelp: This includes help with washing, dressing, eating, taking medication, or needing someone to watch over you for your safety.
eligibility.ineligibleAge: Attendance Allowance is only available to people aged 66 or over.
eligibility.ineligibleResidency: You must have lived in Great Britain for at least 2 of the last 3 years.
eligibility.ineligibleBenefit: You cannot receive Attendance Allowance at the same time as DLA, PIP, or ADP.
eligibility.ineligibleCare: Attendance Allowance is for people who need help with personal care or supervision due to a disability or health condition.
eligibility.pensionCreditQuestion: Are you currently receiving Pension Credit?
eligibility.pensionCreditHelp: Pension Credit is a separate benefit — you can receive both Pension Credit and Attendance Allowance at the same time.
eligibility.alternativeHelp: You may be entitled to other benefits. Contact Citizens Advice or your local council for more information.
eligibility.settlementQuestion: Do you have the right to reside in the UK?
eligibility.settlementHelp: For example: British or Irish citizen, Settled Status (EUSS), Pre-Settled Status, Indefinite Leave to Remain, or another valid visa with right to reside.
eligibility.ineligibleSettlement: To be eligible for Attendance Allowance you must have the legal right to reside in the UK.

personal.title: Your Personal Details
personal.intro: Please provide your personal information as it appears on official documents.
personal.dobInvalid: Please enter a valid date of birth
personal.niInvalid: Please enter a valid National Insurance number (e.g. QQ 12 34 56 C)
personal.postcodeInvalid: Please enter a valid UK postcode

contact.title: Your Contact Details
contact.intro: One of our advisors will call you to discuss your eligibility and help with the next steps. Your phone number is required.
contact.phoneHelp: We will call you on this number to discuss your eligibility
contact.emailHelp: We will send a confirmation to this address if provided
contact.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid UK phone number
contact.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

health.title: Your Health Conditions
health.checklistIntro: Please tick all conditions that apply to you.
health.otherLabel: Any other condition not listed above?

daytime.title: Daytime Care Needs
daytime.intro: Tell us what help you need during the day. Be as detailed as possible — describe what you cannot do without help.
daytime.needsHelp: Do you need help with this?
daytime.frequency: How many times per day or week?
daytime.mobility: Moving around inside or outside the home
daytime.supervision: Supervision to keep you safe (e.g. risk of falls, confusion)
daytime.frequencyPlaceholder: e.g. twice a day, 3 times a week
daytime.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what help you need and who provides it...

nighttime.title: Nighttime Care Needs
nighttime.intro: Tell us about any help you need during the night (from when you go to bed to when you wake up).
nighttime.needsHelp: Do you need help during the night?
nighttime.description: Describe what help you need at night
nighttime.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. help getting to the toilet, re-positioning, taking medication, reassurance due to confusion...
nighttime.watcher: Does someone need to be available to help you throughout the night?
nighttime.watcherDescription: Please describe why someone needs to be available
nighttime.frequencyRequired: Please enter how often you need nighttime help
nighttime.descriptionRequired: Please describe the help you need at night

medications.title: Medications & Treatments
medications.intro: List all medications and treatments you currently receive for your conditions.

professionals.title: Healthcare Professionals
professionals.intro: List the doctors, nurses, and other healthcare professionals involved in your care.
professionals.name: Name
professionals.lastSeen: When did you last see them?
professionals.treatedFor: What do they treat you for?

review.title: Review Your Details
review.intro: Please check your answers below before we contact you. Click Edit on any section to make changes.
review.declaration: I consent to being contacted by the team to discuss my Attendance Allowance eligibility. I confirm the information provided is accurate to the best of my knowledge.

confirmation.title: Details Received
confirmation.thankYou: Thank you — we have received your details and will be in touch shortly.
confirmation.step1: One of our advisors will review your eligibility check.
confirmation.step2: We will call you on the number you provided within 2 working days.
confirmation.step3: If you are eligible, we will help you complete and submit the official Attendance Allowance form.
confirmation.step4: Once submitted to DWP, decisions typically take around 40 working days.
confirmation.keepReference: Please keep this reference number for your records.
confirmation.helpline: If you have any questions, please call our helpline.

errors.submitFailed: There was a problem sending your details. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
